prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别约7501名、10224名、7990名、10940名、87721名。2021–2024年位次在7500–11000区间波动，整体后移；2025年因再选化学组出现严重断档，最低位次骤降至87721名，属于异常波动，2026年预计将明显回升；该校在安徽省理科组招生计划2021年116人、2022年114人、2023年113人、2024年112人、2025年122人；2026年计划127人，较2025年扩招5人，扩招幅度约4.1%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第38名，近年排名稳定在36–39名区间，属于国内顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争议，影响有限；2025年曾发生学生实习安全事故（偏负面），但已过周期；抖音热度排名第82位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低；第五轮学科评估中，控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A-、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，尤其控制、计算机等热门专业与当前社会专业热度高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与东北大学优势学科高度契合，对高分考生吸引力较强；安徽省2026年总考生约45.1万人，物理类估算约31.4万人，较2025年（约32.1万人）略有减少，竞争小幅缓解；东北大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，在安徽省招生占比约4%（2025年144人/全国3581人），属于跨省招生比例中等水平；东北地区近年面临一定地域偏好下行压力，但东北大学作为985工科强校，地域影响相对有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年再选化学组断档异常（87721名）预计2026年将明显回归、2026年扩招5人（竞争略加剧）、物理类考生数小幅减少（竞争略缓解）、学校层次稳固、优势学科与热门专业高度匹配等因素，考虑断档回归效应做最大幅度负修正（-8988），预测2026年理科最低位次约80890名，区间80390–81390名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 7501, 10224, 7990, 10940, and 87721 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated within the 7500–11000 range, showing an overall backward shift; in 2025, due to a severe gap in the re-selected chemistry group, the lowest ranking plummeted to 87721, an abnormal fluctuation, which is expected to significantly rebound in 2026. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Anhui Province was 116 in 2021, 114 in 2022, 113 in 2023, 112 in 2024, and 122 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 127, an increase of 5 students compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 4.1%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 38th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 36–39 range in recent years, making it a top domestic engineering powerhouse. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus, with limited impact. In 2025, a student internship safety incident occurred (somewhat negative), but it has passed its cycle. Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, rated as average, with moderately low exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering received A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A-, Metallurgical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, and Materials Science and Engineering A-, totaling 6 disciplines rated A- or above, highlighting strong engineering capabilities, especially in popular fields like control and computer science, which highly match current societal professional trends.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines and strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, Anhui Province has approximately 451,000 total examinees, with an estimated 314,000 in the physics category, a slight decrease from about 321,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, with an enrollment share in Anhui of about 4% (144 out of 3581 nationwide in 2025), a moderate cross-provincial enrollment ratio. The Northeast region has faced some downward pressure in regional preference in recent years, but as a 985 engineering powerhouse, the regional impact on Northeastern University is relatively limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal gap in the re-selected chemistry group in 2025 (ranking 87721), which is expected to significantly rebound in 2026, the expansion of 5 students in 2026 (slightly intensifying competition), a slight decrease in the number of physics category examinees (slightly easing competition), a stable university level, and a high match between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, a maximum negative correction (-8988) is applied due to the rebound effect from the gap. The predicted lowest ranking for science in 2026 is approximately 80890, with a range of 80390–81390.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Technology College/Zhixing Talent Class)
- Automation (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Robotics Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Computer Science (including Software Engineering, Information Security, etc.)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (1) (Metallurgy, Energy, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (2) (Mineral Processing, Civil Engineering, etc.)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Business Administration, Accounting, etc.)
- Chemistry (including Chemistry, Applied Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (80390–81390), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch goal (requiring a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Northeastern University's flagship majors such as Control Science and Engineering (A+) and Computer Science and Technology (A) are highly competitive; candidates with rankings within 80000 are advised to prioritize Tier 1 majors; those with rankings around 81000 should mainly consider Tier 2; candidates with rankings beyond 81390 are advised to primarily rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1772, 1973, 2065, 2057, and 2198 respectively, showing a slow backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 426 places over the past 5 years, averaging about 85 places per year; the 2025 baseline is about 2198; the university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Anhui Province was 20 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 22 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 21, a reduction of 1 student compared to 2025, a reduction rate of about 4.5%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; it ranked 38th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus, which has limited impact on liberal arts enrollment; Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, with an average evaluation; Northeastern University is strong in engineering, while its liberal arts majors (Public Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature, Humanities Experimental Class) lack A-level discipline evaluations, making its overall liberal arts strength relatively weaker compared to engineering, thus having limited appeal to high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially hot, but Northeastern University's liberal arts majors mainly focus on Public Administration and Foreign Languages and Literature, which are not the hottest directions in liberal arts currently; the estimated number of history category candidates in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 137,000, a slight decrease from about 141,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, with a relatively small proportion of liberal arts enrollment in Anhui (22 history category students in 2025), and cross-provincial enrollment scale is stable; the regional preference for Northeast China has a slightly greater impact on liberal arts candidates than on science candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the slow backward trend of historical rankings, the reduction of 1 student in 2026 (slightly easing competition), the slight decrease in the number of history category candidates (slightly easing competition), and the average strength of liberal arts majors, with a small negative correction (-30) based on the backward trend, the predicted minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 is about 2108, with a range of 1792–2424.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Humanities Experimental Class (including Ideological and Political Education, Philosophy)
- Public Administration (including Law, Public Affairs Management, Administrative Management, Land Resource Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (including English, Japanese, Russian, German).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Northeastern University only offers 3 liberal arts majors in Anhui Province, with limited tiering space. For rankings within the predicted range (1792–2424), it is recommended to prioritize Public Administration (including Law direction) as the main choice, Humanities Experimental Class as a reach, and Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety. The overall strength of liberal arts majors at Northeastern University is weaker than engineering, so liberal arts candidates should carefully choose based on their own professional interests.
